response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement and brings strong full-stack engineering fundamentals with entrepreneurial background, they lack the critical AI expertise and demonstrated AI products essential for a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI Strategy. AI exposure is limited to a recent 6-month stint at re:cinq, they lack the preferred Master's/PhD in AI, and they are currently unavailable due to an ongoing career gap for caregiving.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with ~20 years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Open-source founder (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative and platform-building capabilities
Recently exposed to AI infrastructure and frameworks (AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators) at re:cinq
concerns: AI expertise minimal and very recent (6 months); no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or track record advising customers on AI adoption strategy
Missing preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI-related field; only undergraduate Computer Science degree
Currently in career gap for caregiving with no stated return date; unavailable for full-time senior strategic engagement

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI products or strategic expertise
Software engineering breadth and entrepreneurial background
